title: Podcast Episode Recap
scenario: Recap a 5-minute podcast episode discussing a recent news story. The summary should be 1-2 paragraphs long, mention the news story, the main points discussed, and the key takeaways. Use a conversational tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary adheres to the word limit and tense requirements.
Verify that the summary includes the main points and key takeaways from the podcast episode.
Check if the tone of the summary matches a conversational tone.
